name: Socialist Party: Justice, Equity and Peace
objective: Mobilize the poor and working class around healthcare and labor rights.
mainMessage: A Zambia for the many, not the few: Fighting for real healthcare and living wages.
talkingPoints: Healthcare Crisis: Medicines must be in clinics, not just in pharmacies.
Worker Rights: Ending casualization and ensuring a living wage.
Peasant Farmer Support: Direct fertilizer subsidies for the small-scale farmer.
Socialist Vision: National resources must benefit the people, not foreign companies.

questions.prompt: When you last visited the clinic, did you find the medicine you needed?
Do you believe the current government is doing enough for the working class?
Will you support the Socialist Party to bring real equity to Zambia?
